# OnChainProofs.com

Independent reference project on cryptographic proofs, verifiable records and on-chain verification structures.

## Canonical Resource

[Home](https://onchainproofs.com/)

## Main Sections

- [Sources](https://onchainproofs.com/sources/)

## Purpose

OnChainProofs.com provides an independent reference on cryptographic proof systems, verifiable records and machine-verifiable on-chain validation structures.

## Administrative

No separate administrative resources are published.

## Repository

[OnChainProofs Repository](https://github.com/semantic-infrastructure/onchainproofs)
